question: List employee first and last names
Get orders with customer names
correct_sql: SELECT o.*, c."customerName" FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o."customerNumber" = c."customerNumber"

question: Get employees with office city
correct_sql: SELECT e.*, o."city" AS "officeCity" FROM employees e JOIN offices o ON e."officeCode" = o."officeCode"

question: Get payments with customer names
correct_sql: SELECT p.*, c."customerName" FROM payments p JOIN customers c ON p."customerNumber" = c."customerNumber"

question: Get order details with product names
correct_sql: SELECT od.*, pr."productName" FROM orderdetails od JOIN products pr ON od."productCode" = pr."productCode"

question: Get products with product line description
correct_sql: SELECT p.*, pl."textDescription" FROM products p JOIN productlines pl ON p."productLine" = pl."productLine"

question: Get customers with sales rep names
correct_sql: SELECT c.*, e."firstName" AS "salesRepFirstName", e."lastName" AS "salesRepLastName" FROM customers c LEFT JOIN employees e ON c."salesRepEmployeeNumber" = e."employeeNumber"

question: Get orders with customer city
correct_sql: SELECT o.*, c."city" AS "customerCity" FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o."customerNumber" = c."customerNumber"

question: Get employees and their manager
correct_sql: SELECT e."employeeNumber", e."firstName", e."lastName", m."firstName" AS "managerFirstName", m."lastName" AS "managerLastName" FROM employees e LEFT JOIN employees m ON e."reportsTo" = m."employeeNumber"

question: Get orderdetails with product vendor
correct_sql: SELECT od.*, p."productVendor" FROM orderdetails od JOIN products p ON od."productCode" = p."productCode"

question: Get payments with customer country
correct_sql: SELECT p.*, c."country" FROM payments p JOIN customers c ON p."customerNumber" = c."customerNumber"

question: Count customers per country
correct_sql: SELECT "country", COUNT(*) AS "customerCount" FROM customers GROUP BY "country"

question: Total payments per customer
correct_sql: SELECT "customerNumber", SUM("amount") AS "totalPayments" FROM payments GROUP BY "customerNumber"

question: Number of orders per status
correct_sql: SELECT "status", COUNT(*) AS "orderCount" FROM orders GROUP BY "status"

question: Products per product line
correct_sql: SELECT "productLine", COUNT(*) AS "productCount" FROM products GROUP BY "productLine"

question: Employees per office
correct_sql: SELECT "officeCode", COUNT(*) AS "employeeCount" FROM employees GROUP BY "officeCode"

question: Total stock per product vendor
correct_sql: SELECT "productVendor", SUM("quantityInStock") AS "totalStock" FROM products GROUP BY "productVendor"

question: Average buy price per product line
correct_sql: SELECT "productLine", AVG("buyPrice") AS "avgBuyPrice" FROM products GROUP BY "productLine"

question: Orders per customer
correct_sql: SELECT "customerNumber", COUNT(*) AS "orderCount" FROM orders GROUP BY "customerNumber"

question: Max MSRP per product line
correct_sql: SELECT "productLine", MAX("MSRP") AS "maxMSRP" FROM products GROUP BY "productLine"

question: Min buy price per vendor
correct_sql: SELECT "productVendor", MIN("buyPrice") AS "minBuyPrice" FROM products GROUP BY "productVendor"
